verdict.rationale: The finance pack (authority 1) records Q2 2026 qualified pipeline at EUR 13.510m, matching the claim, but the Q2 2026 Quarterly Update narrative states EUR 13.26m for the same Q2 2026 close-of-period snapshot; neither document explicitly supersedes or reconciles the other, so the same-period, same-metric conflict is unresolved.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the EUR 13.51m finance-pack figure against the EUR 13.26m stated in the Q2 2026 Quarterly Update brief to determine which is the authoritative Q2 2026 qualified pipeline value before approving the claim.

evidence.span_text: The qualified pipeline stood at EUR 13.26 million entering the next quarter.

final_text:
Confirmed. The Q2 2026 Quarterly Update (a narrative brief) states the qualified pipeline was EUR 13.26 million at the close of Q2 2026 ("entering the next quarter"), while the finance pack (authority 1) records EUR 13.510 for the same Q2 2026 actual. Same metric, same period, two different values, no explicit supersession or reconciliation in either document. The regional "Qualified commercial pipeline" (13.053) is a commercial-segment subset under a regional review — a scope difference, not a competing total.
